title-group.article-title: A Stable Right-Sided Quaternion Fourier Regime for Multichannel Spectral Analysis

abstract.p: This draft package prepares the structural publication surfaces for a right-sided quaternion Fourier analysis paper focused on multichannel spectral workflows. The current revision captures machine-readable metadata, claims placeholders, notation placeholders, and exchange files so the series can be indexed consistently while technical derivations are still in progress. It is explicitly a scaffolding release and does not present completed proofs, experimental measurements, or finalized publication details such as DOI, venue, or page range.

license.license-p: This is an open-access article distributed under the terms of the Creative Commons Attribution License (CC BY 4.0).

sec.title: Draft scaffold notice
sec.p: Layout scaffolding release; full paper text pending.
